data.title: US Stocks Hold Steady, Travel Demand Fuels Airlines, Tesla Reaches 32-Month Highs: What's Driving Markets Thursday?
data.description: Wall Street experienced subdued trading on Thursday morning, with major indices remaining near the flatline as investors awaited further confirmation of potential interest rate cuts from the upcoming November jobs report.

Nvidia Partners With Vietnam Government To Develop Advanced AI And More
data.description: Nvidia founder agreed to open AI research center in Vietnam, acquire VinBrain, and help develop country's AI infrastructure. Vietnam targets $100B from semiconductors by 2050.
